```python
def next_permutation(xs):
    i = len(xs) - 2
    while i >= 0 and xs[i] >= xs[i + 1]:
        i -= 1
    if i < 0:
        xs.reverse()
        return None
    j = len(xs) - 1
    while xs[j] <= xs[i]:
        j -= 1
    xs[i], xs[j] = xs[j], xs[i]
    xs[i + 1:] = xs[i + 1:][::-1]
    return None
```
